headline: 暑期档新片热度攀升，奥德赛领跑
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up, Odyssey Leads Trends
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周《奥德赛》《痴迷》《后室》等片持续霸榜，鬼谜东宫热度不减。星光继承者新作入榜，安昂传奇与蜘蛛侠新片备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but Odyssey, Obsession, and Backrooms dominate weekly charts. Ghost Mystery Eastern Palace stays hot. Descendants: Dark Wonderland enters top trends; Avatar: The Last Airbender and Spider-Man: Fresh Day highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》连续两周蝉联热度榜首
industryHighlights.en: Odyssey tops trending for second consecutive week

industryHighlights.text: 《海洋奇缘：启航》跻身本周热门榜
industryHighlights.en: Moana: Set Sail enters weekly top trends

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》与《蜘蛛侠》新片定档引发期待
industryHighlights.en: Avatar and Spider-Man new films generate buzz

industryHighlights.text: 暑期档竞争白热化，多部新片蓄势待发
industryHighlights.en: Summer season heats up with multiple upcoming releases
